case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. JOSE M. CARDOZA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, JOSE M.
